evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: In 1999, Namazi and Parsi co-authored a paper at a Cyprus conference proposing the creation of an Iranian-American lobby — the conceptual blueprint for NIAC.

editorial_notes: Parsi also worked as an analyst for Namazi's Atieh Bahar Consulting while leading NIAC.
